place: Ko Kaeo, Amphoe Mueang, Phuket 83000, Thailand
title: Hilltop Four-Bedroom Pool Villa with Mountain & City Views
blurb: A boutique hilltop development in Ko Kaeo, central Phuket — contemporary four-bedroom pool villas with double-height glass and wide mountain-and-city views, a five-minute drive from British International School Phuket. Four-bedroom homes from $1,743,000, each with a 12 × 3.5 m private pool; the first show villa completes in August 2026, with larger five-bedroom villas also available.
detail:
Rising on a quiet hillside in Ko Kaeo — one of central Phuket's fastest-emerging residential pockets — this is a boutique collection of contemporary pool villas defined by clean, stacked horizontal planes, timber screening and full-height glass that open each home to the slope and the views beyond. The setting is ideal for families: British International School Phuket is just a five-minute drive away, making this a natural choice for parents with children at the school, with marinas, beaches, the airport and central Phuket all within easy reach.

The four-bedroom villas are set over two floors of roughly 650 m². The ground floor is given over to open-plan living, dining and a sleek island kitchen that slide out to a covered terrace and a private 12 × 3.5-metre swimming pool, framed by lawn and tropical planting. Glazing on three sides keeps the interiors bright and connected to the mountain and city outlook in every direction.

All four bedrooms are en-suite, with the principal suite taking the best of the elevation, and a fifth bathroom serves the living areas. Finishes are modern and restrained throughout and — as new builds still under construction — there is scope to tailor materials and details to taste. An optional furniture package (approximately ฿3.4–4.5 million) can hand the villa over fully fitted and turnkey.

Four-bedroom villas are priced from $1,743,000 (about ฿57,500,000), with larger five-bedroom villas in the development up to around $2,320,000. The first show villa is scheduled for completion in August 2026, and homes are offered on freehold or leasehold terms, each with a covered garage.

features.l: 5 min to British International School Phuket
Hilltop position in Ko Kaeo, central Phuket
